summary: Frontend testing of refactored components (Ground0LessonPlayer, PortalPage, REACHAssessmentPage). All 3 major refactored pages render correctly. Data wiring verified: LESSONS in Ground0 OverviewView (lesson list G0-1 through G0-4+ visible), QUESTIONS in REACH (question phases load, first question renders with Yes/Possibly/No options), CURRICULUM in Portal sidebar (Ground 0 lessons visible with durations). No JS console errors on public pages.

integration_issues.issue: Portal page returns 401 on auth API (expected — requires login). Page shows Ground 0 public overview as fallback. Not a refactoring regression.

confirmed_passing: Homepage (/) renders with blueprint grid, scan-line animations, and nav — no errors
Ground 0 briefing (/ground-0-briefing) renders OverviewView with LESSONS data wired — lesson list (G0-1 through G0-4+) visible, module title/description correct
Ground 0 lesson list accordion buttons work (G0-1 The Reality of Motor Carrier Authority, G0-2, etc.)
REACH Assessment (/reach-diagnostic) intro renders with REACH pillar cards (R/E/A/C/H) — data from reachData.js wired correctly
REACH BEGIN button works — transitions to question phase (LOG_ENTRY_01_OF_15) with section heading and Yes/Possibly/No answer options from QUESTIONS data
Knowledge Center (/knowledge-center) renders without errors — 11 briefs, 15 articles stats shown
No JS console errors on homepage, ground-0-briefing, reach-diagnostic, or knowledge-center
critical_code_review_comments: No new issues found from refactoring. All extracted sub-components and data files are wired correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring of Ground0LessonPlayer, PortalPage, REACHAssessmentPage confirmed working. All data imports (LESSONS, QUESTIONS, CURRICULUM) are correctly wired to sub-components. Prior UX issues from iteration_105 (nav tap targets, hamburger breakpoint at 1100px) still pending if not fixed by main agent.
